title: Stacking Potion
description: This datapack allows you to carry any potion type in your inventory with a maximum stack size of 16.
body:
[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
This datapack allows you to carry any type of potion in your inventory with a maximum stack size of 16. This helps lighten your inventory space and ensures battles last much longer by utilizing this new mechanic.
